textByHash.0764ce88b2099e4d26651423ccc4ee28c5a03ffa: You heard me! Restore what you have stolen from my tomb!
textByHash.63579bba2e163e71126125f8263dbc17b5f7fd11: You foul thief, return what is mine!
textByHash.6c78d43947429c2aeb2cda2b0b2366c26bd42154: You worm! May the Devourer take your soul!
textByHash.d441628e7141d44e940f7e194ad84a0828d95705: You pathetic excuse for a thief!
textByHash.dfcf829a60a81e8b3fa20765c152b3af8534e3df: Thank you, adventurer. You have given my soul some respite.
